summary: Full-Stack Software Engineer with 4+ years building production-grade cloud-native applications, scalable backends, and DevOps infrastructure. Proven expertise architecting systems combining React/TypeScript frontends with robust Express/Node.js backends, PostgreSQL databases, and automated CI/CD pipelines using GitHub Actions. Strong hands-on experience optimizing cloud deployments on AWS and GCP, implementing Docker containerization, and Linux server administration. Demonstrated success reducing operational costs through database tuning (25% improvement), infrastructure optimization (15% cost reduction), and deployment automation (60% faster cycles). Passionate about building reliable, maintainable systems for high-growth environments.

experience.title: Senior Software Engineer – Full-Stack Development
bullets: Architected production-grade full-stack system combining React/TypeScript frontend with Express/PostgreSQL backend and Python ML pipelines, ensuring 99%+ uptime and horizontal scalability.
Designed and deployed scalable cloud infrastructure on GCP and Railway using Infrastructure-as-Code principles, implementing automated CI/CD pipelines that reduced deployment time by 60%.
Implemented GitHub Actions CI/CD workflows automating build, test, and deployment cycles; added comprehensive error handling and monitoring reducing production incidents by 40%.
Optimized PostgreSQL queries and implemented intelligent caching strategies, reducing backend response times by 25% and cutting infrastructure costs by 15%.
Containerized full-stack applications using Docker and Docker Compose, ensuring consistency across development, staging, and production environments.
Led peer code review process for 25+ pull requests; coordinated concurrent feature development across multi-member team, establishing quality gates for production deployment.

experience.title: Software Engineer – Embedded Fans
bullets: Managed Linux server administration, shell scripting, and troubleshooting; implemented automated deployment scripts reducing manual ops work.
Engineered IoT-based smart home systems using Tuya SDKs with encrypted communication channels and secure firmware update mechanisms.
Integrated surveillance and vehicle tracking systems with cloud services improving reliability and monitoring accuracy.

experience.title: Software Engineer (Web Technologies)
bullets: Designed and implemented RESTful API endpoints using Java EE, handling complex payroll data queries with sub-100ms response times.
Optimized MySQL and PostgreSQL queries reducing query execution times by 30%, improving overall system throughput.
Built production email notification system integrating SendGrid API with secure credential management using environment variables and secrets management best practices.
Implemented secure credential handling for third-party API keys, removed hardcoded secrets, and applied OWASP Top 10 principles across backend services.
Participated in structured peer code review with senior developers, implementing architectural feedback on naming conventions, security practices, and design patterns.

experience.title: Software Engineer
bullets: Designed and delivered custom enterprise software solutions across healthcare and finance sectors using Java EE backends and secure coding practices.
Conducted code reviews, refactored legacy systems, and introduced design patterns (Factory, Observer, Singleton) for improved maintainability.
Applied OWASP Top 10 principles and performed penetration testing ensuring compliance with industry security standards.

projects.name: Label Scanner Platform
projects.subtitle: Full-Stack AI/ML Product Verification System
bullets: Production-grade system achieving 95% accuracy in intelligent product analysis using Google Cloud Vision API.
Reduced backend response times by 25% through query optimization and caching; optimized infrastructure costs by 15%.
Team leadership on concurrent feature development with 25+ code reviews and architectural decisions.

projects.name: Web3 Bots and Farcaster Mini-Apps
projects.subtitle: Decentralized Applications
bullets: Designed and deployed multiple Farcaster mini-apps and Web3 bots integrating X API and Farcaster with hybrid automation.
Applied modern CI/CD principles and GitHub Actions automation for reliable production deployments.
Contributed to open-source blockchain projects (Scaffold-ETH, Hardhat, wagmi, ethers.js).
